description: verification-architecture.md prescribed the file layout vault-transition.ts and a single error-mapping.ts, but the implementation uses validate-and-transition.ts and splits error mapping into map-stat-dir-result.ts and map-settings-save-error.ts. REQ-014 line 266 also named vault-transition.ts. Resolved in-place by editing the spec docs to record the actual split; source files were not renamed (test imports match the impl).

evidence.snippet: Test Harness Layout updated to validate-and-transition.ts / map-stat-dir-result.ts / map-settings-save-error.ts

resolution.notes: Updated specs/verification-architecture.md (Test Harness Layout + Type-Level Contracts) and specs/behavioral-spec.md REQ-014 acceptance to reference the actual file names. Spec is now in sync with the implementation.
